chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-97 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 446/2018 For hearing of main case 26.05.2022 This petition is pending since 2018 and has been fixed by the office for the first time. The petitioner never cared to have it fixed even once in these four years. Petitioner has prayed for the release of Rs.40 million for the constituency i.e. PS-49 Hyderabad. Since the petitioner and his counsel are called absent, dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE
